description_long: This office building features a striking, angular roof clad in reddish-brown tiles, creating a dynamic and modern silhouette. The facade is punctuated by a grid of irregularly arranged, dark-framed windows, giving the exterior a geometric and contemporary appearance. Lush green trees and landscaping surround the building, providing a natural contrast to the sharp architectural lines. The structure includes multiple floors, with visible open-plan office spaces and corridors, as well as a partially exposed section revealing the building's interior layout. The base of the building is set on a raised platform, with a combination of concrete and glass elements visible. The overall design suggests a blend of modernist and sustainable architectural influences, emphasizing both functionality and aesthetic appeal.
description: A modern office building with an angular tiled roof, irregular window grid, and lush landscaping, featuring multiple floors and a partially exposed interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular tiled roof, irregular window grid, and main entrance area.
description_view_1: Side cutaway view revealing the interior floor structure and dense greenery along the building's edge.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by lush trees, with the building's back facade and window arrangement partially visible.
description_view_3: Oblique cutaway view displaying multiple floors, interior office spaces, and the integration of greenery with the building's structure.
attribute_window_pattern: Irregular grid of rectangular windows with varied spacing and orientation, creating a dynamic geometric pattern.
